# The Fisher Slopworks Co

> A small free-software foundry. We make small, sharp tools and experiments —
> all machine-written, shipped in the open under AGPL-3.0-or-later, and
> REUSE-compliant. This site (slopworks.org) is a single static page that
> catalogues the org's open-source tools.

Every project below lives in the GitHub organisation
<https://github.com/The-Fisher-Slopworks-Co> and is free to use, study, or take
apart. There is no API, no account, and no tracking — just source code.

## Tools

- [xfleet](https://github.com/The-Fisher-Slopworks-Co/xfleet): fleet control for self-hosted VPN.
- [any_talker](https://github.com/The-Fisher-Slopworks-Co/any_talker): an AI Telegram bot you can watch think.
- [co2ppm](https://github.com/The-Fisher-Slopworks-Co/co2ppm): breathe-easy air-quality metrics for an ESP32.
- [d10](https://github.com/The-Fisher-Slopworks-Co/d10): roll one ten-sided die, with real physics — also embedded on the homepage.
- [rstlrx](https://github.com/The-Fisher-Slopworks-Co/rstlrx): blazingly fast terminal lyrics.
- [lrcgen](https://github.com/The-Fisher-Slopworks-Co/lrcgen): make LRC lyric files by tapping along.
- [sptlrx-cc](https://github.com/The-Fisher-Slopworks-Co/sptlrx-cc): karaoke lyrics, rendered inside Minecraft.
- [ignore & exclude](https://github.com/The-Fisher-Slopworks-Co/ignore-and-exclude): one click to ignore a file (editor extension).
- [stamp](https://github.com/The-Fisher-Slopworks-Co/stamp): a distinct colour per project window (editor extension).
- [template](https://github.com/The-Fisher-Slopworks-Co/template): the project template every repo starts from.

## Standard

- [License — AGPL-3.0-or-later](https://slopworks.org/LICENSE): every project, and this website, is AGPL and REUSE-compliant.
- [Compliance notes](https://github.com/The-Fisher-Slopworks-Co/.github/blob/main/COMPLIANCE.md): how the org keeps its free-software standard.
- [Website source](https://github.com/The-Fisher-Slopworks-Co/The-Fisher-Slopworks-Co.github.io): this page's repository.
